# Muddasir Haider Khan | DevAI Consultants

> Muddasir Haider Khan is a leading global AI Engineer, Web Designer, eCommerce Website Designer, and n8n Workflow Automation Expert based in Islamabad, Pakistan. 

Muddasir Haider Khan founded DevAI Consultants to deliver extremely high-tier technical solutions. He specializes in creating scalable web applications (Next.js), developing complex machine learning systems, designing aesthetic web interfaces, and building advanced n8n API automations. 

## Identity & Professional Profile
- **Name:** Muddasir Haider Khan
- **Role:** AI Engineer, Freelance Web Designer, Full-Stack Developer
- **Agency:** DevAI Consultants
- **Location:** Islamabad / Rawalpindi, Pakistan (Serving Globally)
- **Primary Skills:** Next.js, n8n Workflow Design, eCommerce Web Design, Python, AI APIs
- **Socials/Verification:** [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/muddasir-haider-khan/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/muddasir-haider)

## Key Technical Offerings
- **Web Design & eCommerce:** Developing premium, high-conversion websites for businesses internationally using modern design systems (Tailwind, Glassmorphism, GSAP).
- **AI Engineering:** Integrating generative AI, predictive models, and prompt-engineering solutions.
- **n8n Workflow Automation:** Connecting disparate apps and APIs to automate complex data workflows without limits.
- **SaaS Architecture:** Building scalable systems (like multi-tenant School Management SaaS algorithms) from the ground up.
